Use 'paulos setup' after install to see what still needs manual configuration.
Use 'paulos delta fix' once to make git diff/git show use Delta.
Use 'paulos font download' if icons show as boxes or question marks.
Use 'lt' to quickly inspect a project tree.
Use 'scripts' to quickly see all package.json commands.
Use 'port 3000' or 'killport 3000' when a dev server gets stuck.
Use 'approve' or 'paulos pnpm approve' when pnpm blocks dependency build scripts.
Use 'grep <text>' instead of searching manually in huge repos.
